raw_responses.title: Spark-TTS Efficient LLM TTS Single-Stream Decoupled Speech Tokens (2025/03)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: attribute tokenizer with fine-grained values via BiCodec; precise pitch control via quantization.

raw_responses.title: SAC Neural Speech Codec Semantic-Acoustic Dual-Stream Quantization (2510.16841)

raw_responses.title: VoxCPM Tokenizer-Free TTS Context-Aware Speech (2509.24650)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: residual acoustic LM preserves subtle vocal characteristics typically sacrificed by discrete quantization.

raw_responses.title: CosyVoice 2 LLM Speech Synthesis (FunAudioLLM)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: replaces VQ with FSQ (finite scalar quantization) for finer-grained pitch/emotion control + fine-grained parameters.

raw_responses.title: STCTS Generative Semantic Compression Text-Prosody-Timbre Decomposition (2512.00451)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: non-uniform prosody-delta Huffman coding exploiting strong concentration near zero; non-uniform bin allocation by prosody distribution.

raw_responses.title: Emotional TTS Mutual-Information Emotion-Timbre Disentanglement (2510.01722)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: timbre stable / emotion variable disentanglement; per-phoneme style encoder for emotion-prosody.

raw_responses.title: NaturalSpeech 3 Zero-Shot Speech Synthesis FACodec
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: factorized vector quantization decomposing into content + prosody + acoustic + timbre subspaces.

raw_responses.title: Unsupervised Quantized Prosody Representation Controllable Speech Synthesis (2204.03238)
